🔔 What is SolSlay ?

🎮 SolSlay is a free-to-play, competitive, real-time gaming platform on solana where players can compete in live games and earn rewards through gameplay 🎁

🤔 Is SolSlay free to play ?
✅ Yes.
🎮 SolSlay is free-to-play platform

🤔 Is SolSlay Play-to-Earn? 
✅ Yes
🎁 SolSlay rewards active players in multiples ways:

⚔️ Ranking on Boss Battle by dealing damage and climbing the leaderboard 
📜 Completing Quests ( Daily and one-time missions )
🎯 Winning rounds in $SOL Jackpot and #SLY Jackpot 
🎁 Claiming the Faucet / Airdrop ( Limited-Time )

☀️ SolSlay currency supports:
#SOL
- Solana native token 
- Earned through Boss Battle, quests and special events

#SLY
- SolSlay platform token built on the Solana Blockchain 
- Earned through Boss battle, Faucet/Airdrop, quests and referrals 

🤔 How to connect to SolSlay ? 
1. Open SolSlay
2. Connect your Solana wallet 
3. Verify wallet ownership ( sign a message )
🚫 This is not a transaction
🚫 It does not move funds
✅ It securely confirms that you own the wallet

🎮 Games on SolSlay 

1) Boss Battle ( PvE ) 
⚔️ Boss Battle is a real-time boss event where players attacks together and compete for ranked rewards 

🤔 How it works ? 
- You attack the boss using  energy
- Energy cost: 1 energy per attack
- Energy regen +1 every 2 minutes
- You climb the leaderboard by dealing damage

🎁 Rewards ( Performance-Based )
- Rewards are distributed based on your final rank 
- Bosses rarity tiers ( Common -> Mythic ), with higher tiers offering bigger rewards. 

2) SOL Jackpot ( Solana Jackpot ) 
🏆 Players enter with $SOL ( Solana ) and one winner takes the entire pot.

🤔 How it works ?
- The round begins once 2+ players join.
- The rounds runs for 90 seconds 
- Each player chance is weighted by their contribution on the pot
- At the end of the timer, a winner is selected and the entire pot is awarded 

3) SLY Jackpot 
🎯 The same winner take all format, but played with SLY

🤔 How it works ?
- Players enter with $SLY
- The round begins once 2+ players join.
- The rounds runs for 90 seconds 
- Each player chance is weighted by their contribution on the pot
- At the end of the timer, a winner is selected and the entire pot is awarded

🤔 Can I withdraw SOL or SLY ?
✅ Yes
↘️ You can withdraw SOL or SLY directly to your connected wallet. 

🤔 Can I swap SOL to SLY or SLY to SOL ? 
⏳ The swap system will be available soon. 
💱 Users will be able to swap $SOL to $SLY and $SLY to $SOL directly on the SolSlay platform.

🎮 SolSlay is built to be simple to start, competitive to master and rewarding for active players. 🎁

✅ https://t.co/R7hY7Z0Z0C

#solslay #playtoearn #p2e #freetoplay #solana #airdrop #giveaway

Infra and Backend:
• Started sending testnet blobs to Celestia's mainnet to test load and costs

reason: Token Launch / Pump cluster linked by [token, launch, airdrop, solana, tge]

sampleTweets.text:
Wale might be smart

But let me show you how to make +115% with just 10% max loss potential:

1) Pick "No" MegaETH $800M FDV 1 day after TGE for 68% on @wormwtf with 3x leverage

2) Pick "Yes" MegaETH airdrop by June 30 for 44% on Polymarket

The interesting thing?

If MegaETH does not launch a token by June 30, the FDV market will resolve to "No"

This means:

- If MegaETH launches a token/airdrop by June 30 but FDV is above $800M — you win bet 2

- If MegaETH doesn't launch a token by June 30 — you win bet 1

- If MegaETH launches a token/airdrop by June 30 and FDV is under $800M — you win both bets (JACKPOT!)

Put $200 on Worm (bet 1) with 3x leverage → you win $482

Put $200 on Polymarket (bet 2) → you win $380 with current liquidity

Ofc you can get liquidated on Worm, but the longer TGE takes, the less likely people believe in a high FDV which brings you the first quick profit of bet 1)

On Polymarket,

This morning, a Polymarket trader held a large open position betting that BP's FDV would exceed $200M one day after TGE. As the resolution window approached and BP was trading around $0.19, it appears certain traders purchased a significant amount of BP tokens in an attempt to push the price above $0.20 and win their Polymarket bet.

We investigated immediately.

These traders are not insiders. They are not employees, directors, officers, advisors, or in any way affiliated with Backpack. We have zero tolerance for insider trading of any kind.

So let me get this straight:

> Pump fun makes ~$1M/day

> They bought back 30% of their circulating supply

> Their token is still down 80% from ATH

Means they used last year's revenue to buy their own token back

But why?

So either it's the most retarded thing ever (unlikely)

Or 

They accumulate as many tokens as possible without making a big scene and pump the chart later when the airdrop went live ?!

What’s the bull case for Mad Lads?

Rode some from $10K to $1K
Airdrop disappointed...

Still they’re THE one and only face of Solana…

But how do you attract new buyers?

No VIP on Backpack, no real utility

So what’s the plan?

Or are they just becoming “culture” like DeGods? https://t.co/iGZe2CCnyD

sampleTweets.text:
I respect having a thesis and doing the research. 
Sometimes you're right, sometimes you're wrong. 

I think @P2Pdotme has put more effort into comms than all recent raises, got attention, and had conversations with the right type of liquid funds. 

I'm not personally excited about P2P, but I haven't done super thorough research. 
I just think they are in a crowded market, but where they are doing things well is they're going after specific regional markets where it's not crowded. 

The fact that they are a permissioned launch from MetaDAO automatically means that Proph3t and Kollan and some VCs firmly believe that they have PMF and they've already raised VC capital before. 

You're going to lose your bets, Jay. Prob all of them. 

What I do think is likely is it will fall pretty immediately under the ICO price. People who made money on Polymarket will just sell their P2P and still be in profit. 

So potentially, DLMMing a range 10% below the ICO price or even a bid-ask system, from the getgo, could give some decent fees. 
There are two days and 14 hours remaining to enter the ICO
You can enter the ICO at @MetaDAOProject website and enter the prediction markets on @JupiterExchange

sampleTweets.text: RT @anza_xyz: Validators: SIMD-0266, which replaces the current SPL token program with a new compute optimized version called p-token, is n…

.@useSolami is building the complete Solana infra stack - staked RPCs, gRPC streams, ShredStream and SWQoS

Staked RPCs route through validators that don’t fold under pressure. gRPC streams deliver real-time data without polling. ShredStream puts you ahead of the chain with raw fragments before full block assembly.

SWQoS skips gossip and lands txs direct to the slot leader. Parsed transactions decode raw Solana output instantly. REST APIs cover balances, history, and metadata out of the box.

Free to start with a 2-day free trial. No credit card. Just build.

The focus is clear: every layer of execution and data, for builders and traders who refuse to slow down.

Three validators just got blacklisted from SAM for consistently lagging behind on slot processing. ~213k SOL heads back to auction where validators who actually keep up with network speed can compete for it.

The criteria are public and data-driven. Performance matters.

https://t.co/Jg2qtbUCr3
